keyEvents.text: Goal! Belize 0, Panama 1. Fidel Escobar (Panama) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Eduardo Guerrero with a headed pass following a corner.
Nahjib Guerra (Belize) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Cristian Martínez (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
José Luis Rodríguez (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Freybin Pagoada (Belize) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Panama. Michael Amir Murillo replaces José Luis Rodríguez.
Substitution, Panama. Jorge Gutiérrez replaces Cecilio Waterman.
Substitution, Panama. Janpol Morales replaces Cristian Martínez.

Substitution, Belize. Warren Moss replaces Izon Gill.

Substitution, Belize. Jahèím Mènå replaces Horace Ávila.
Substitution, Panama. Tomás Rodríguez replaces Eduardo Guerrero.
Substitution, Panama. Edward Cedeño replaces Aníbal Godoy because of an injury.
José Córdoba (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Belize. Andir Chi replaces Krisean López.
